license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pumdnu6
title: Chemically competent V. natriegens cells
author: Carlos H

steps_raw.instruction: Inoculate 150ml BHI + V2-Salts in a buffled flask
Incubate shaking: OD = 0.4, 30°C, 200rpm Undetermined 02:30:00, Competent V. natriegens
Split into three 50ml falcons
Centrifuge: 3000g, 5min, RT 00:05:00, 1. Centrifuge competent V. natriegens
Remove supernatant completely
Resuspend by gently inversion in 5ml 100mM MgCl 2
Pool the cells in two 50ml falcons
Fill up to 30ml with 100mM MgCl 2
Centrifuge: 3000g, 4min, RT 00:04:00, 2. Centrifuge competent V. natriegens
Remove supernatant completely
Resuspend the pellet by gently inversion in 5ml 100mM CaCl 2
Pool the cells into one 50ml falcon
Fill up to 30ml with 100mM CaCl 2
Incubate: 20min, RT 00:20:00, Incubation competent V. natriegens
Centrifuge: 3000g, 4min, RT 00:04:00, 3. Centrifuge competent V. natriegens
Remove supernatant completely
Resuspend the pellet by gently invertion in 1.5ml modified Inoue buffer
Add DMSO to a volume concentration of 7% (=105µl)
Aliquot the cells into chilled tubes (50µl aliquots)
Freeze at -80°C
